Accessory_AirDash1.name: Air Dash Boots
Accessory_AirDash1.desc: An accessory that allows the player to dash in mid-air when equipped.

Accessory_AirDash2.name: Double Air Dash Boots
Accessory_AirDash2.desc: An accessory that allows the player to perform double dashes in mid-air when equipped.

Accessory_JumpCount_Increase1.name: Double Jump Boots
Accessory_JumpCount_Increase1.desc: An accessory that allows the player to jump in mid-air when equipped.

Accessory_JumpCount_Increase2.name: Triple Jump Boots
Accessory_JumpCount_Increase2.desc: An accessory that allows the player to perform double jumps in mid-air when equipped.

Accessory_JumpPower_Increase.name: Anti-Gravity Belt
Accessory_JumpPower_Increase.desc: An accessory that increases the player's jump power when equipped.

Accessory_Nonkilling.name: Ring of Mercy
Accessory_Nonkilling.desc: Pacifist's ring. The wearer's attacks will not reduce the target's Health below 1.

Accessory_TalentChecker.name: Ability Glasses
Accessory_TalentChecker.desc: Glasses used to discern hidden Pal abilities. Displays Health, Attack and Defense stats on a scale of 0 to 100.

AdditionalInventory_001.name: Small Pouch
AdditionalInventory_001.desc: A small pouch that allows you to carry additional items. Holding it increases your inventory slots.

AdditionalInventory_002.name: Medium Pouch
AdditionalInventory_002.desc: A modest pouch that allows you to carry additional items. Holding it increases your inventory slots.

AdditionalInventory_003.name: Large Pouch
AdditionalInventory_003.desc: A large pouch that allows you to carry additional items. Holding it increases your inventory slots.

AdditionalInventory_004.name: Giant Pouch
AdditionalInventory_004.desc: A massive pouch that allows you to carry additional items. Holding it increases your inventory slots.

Altar.name: Summoning Altar
Altar.desc: Offer a Slab depicting a Pal to summon a powerful Pal to your base. Adequate caution and battle readiness is paramount.

AncientArmor.name: Ancient Armor
AncientArmor.desc: Ancient armor forged from Soralite Ingot. Crafted with the essence of a lost civilization, it boasts overwhelming defensive power and is capable of withstanding cataclysmic threats.

AncientArmorCold.name: Cold-Resistant Ancient Armor
AncientArmorCold.desc: Refined Ancient Armor. Its cold resistance has been further enhanced using ancient technology, allowing the wearer to maintain their strength even in extreme cold regions.

AncientArmorHeat.name: Heat-Resistant Ancient Armor
AncientArmorHeat.desc: Refined Ancient Armor. Its heat resistance has been further enhanced using ancient technology, allowing it to endure scorching environments

AncientArmorWeight.name: Lightweight Ancient Armor
AncientArmorWeight.desc: Refined Ancient Armor. It is equipped with ancient auxiliary mechanisms, allowing the wearer to carry more supplies.

AncientBlastFurnace.name: Ancient Furnace
AncientBlastFurnace.desc: A special furnace based on ancient technology that can smelt all types of ingots. Materials are melted with fire, then quickly cooled and solidified using ice. It requires Pals with high-level Kindling and Cooling suitability.

AncientCookingStove.name: Ancient Kitchen
AncientCookingStove.desc: A special kitchen based on ancient technology that can create everything from existing dishes to entirely new recipes. It retains heat through fire and completes cooking with manual preparation, allowing it to prepare any kind of cuisine. It requires Pals with high-level Kindling and Handiwork suitability.

AncientElectricGenerator.name: Ancient Power Generator
AncientElectricGenerator.desc: A highly efficient power generator restored from lost ancient technology. It produces massive amounts of electricity, but is prone to overheating while in operation. It requires Pals with high-level Generating Electricity and any level of Watering suitability.

AncientFarmBlock.name: Ancient Farm
AncientFarmBlock.desc: A special cultivation device based on ancient technology that harnesses the power of the World Tree to grow all kinds of plants on Palpagos Island. Smaller than a berry plantation and suitable for indoor placement, it still follows the same cultivation process as standard plots. It requires Pals with high-level Planting, Watering, and Harvesting suitability.

AncientHelmet.name: Ancient Helm
AncientHelmet.desc: An ancient helmet forged from Soralite Ingot. It is imbued with wisdom passed down through the ages, protecting its wearer with unwavering strength. Its defensive capabilities far surpass those of modern equipment.

AncientMultiProduct.name: Ancient Material Synthesizer
AncientMultiProduct.desc: A special generator based on ancient technology that uses the power of the World Tree to produce all kinds of wood and ore. Due to its complex structure, only one Pal can be assigned to it.

AncientWorkBench.name: Ancient Workbench
AncientWorkBench.desc: A Pal-exclusive workbench that is capable of crafting any item in one place. It cannot be used by the player, and operates at the same speed as a regular workbench. Due to its advanced equipment, it requires Pals with high-level Handiwork and Medicine Production suitability.

Ancient_Houseset.name: Ancient Structure Set
Ancient_Houseset.desc: Set for building bases using ancient architecture. Allows building of ancient-styled foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

Arrow.name: Arrow
Arrow.desc: Arrows for use with bows. Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Arrow_Fire.name: Fire Arrow
Arrow_Fire.desc: Fire Arrows for use with bows. Deals Fire damage on contact. Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Arrow_Poison.name: Poison Arrow
Arrow_Poison.desc: Poison Arrows for use with bows. Afflicts target with Poison on contact. Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

AssaultRifleBullet.name: Assault Rifle Ammo
AssaultRifleBullet.desc: Ammo for the Assault Rifle and similar weapons. Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

AutoMealPouch_Tier1.name: Small Feed Bag
AutoMealPouch_Tier1.desc: Unlocks a food slot in your inventory. Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.

AutoMealPouch_Tier2.name: Average Feed Bag
AutoMealPouch_Tier2.desc: A decently sized pouch for holding food. Unlocks 2 food slots in your inventory. Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.

AutoMealPouch_Tier3.name: Large Feed Bag
AutoMealPouch_Tier3.desc: A large pouch for holding food. Unlocks 3 food slots in your inventory. Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.

AutoMealPouch_Tier4.name: Huge Feed Bag
AutoMealPouch_Tier4.desc: An extremely large pouch for holding food. Unlocks 4 food slots in your inventory. Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.

AutoMealPouch_Tier5.name: Giant Feed Bag
AutoMealPouch_Tier5.desc: An extraordinarily large sack for storing food. Unlocks 5 food slots in your inventory. Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.

BaseCampBattleDirector.name: Alarm Bell
BaseCampBattleDirector.desc: Bell that sets the alert status for Pals on base. Change Pal behavior to either attack invading enemies or focus entirely on work whenever you like.

BaseCampItemDispenser.name: Item Retrieval Machine
BaseCampItemDispenser.desc: A device that lets you freely access items from all chests in the base.

BaseCampWorkHard.name: Monitoring Stand
BaseCampWorkHard.desc: Command your Pals to work on various things inside a base. You can allow or prohibit individual kinds of work.

Battle_Armor_Grade_01_Cloth.name: Cloth Outfit
Battle_Armor_Grade_01_Cloth.desc: Clothes made from Cloth. Protects against cold nights. Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Battle_Armor_Grade_01_Cloth_Cold.name: Tundra Outfit
Battle_Armor_Grade_01_Cloth_Cold.desc: A Cloth Outfit produced in cold regions. Useful for surviving in cold climates. Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Battle_Armor_Grade_01_Cloth_Heat.name: Tropical Outfit
Battle_Armor_Grade_01_Cloth_Heat.desc: A Cloth Outfit produced in hot regions. Boasts high heat resistance. Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Battle_Armor_Grade_02_Fur.name: Pelt Armor
Battle_Armor_Grade_02_Fur.desc: Armor made from Leather. Its warmth and defense have been improved. Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

Battle_Armor_Grade_02_Fur_Cold.name: Cold Resistant Pelt Armor
Battle_Armor_Grade_02_Fur_Cold.desc: A Pelt Armor produced in cold regions. Useful for surviving in cold climates. Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

Battle_Armor_Grade_02_Fur_Heat.name: Heat Resistant Pelt Armor
Battle_Armor_Grade_02_Fur_Heat.desc: A Pelt Armor produced in hot regions. Boasts high heat resistance. Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

Battle_Armor_Grade_03_Copper.name: Metal Armor
Battle_Armor_Grade_03_Copper.desc: Armor made of metal. Somewhat heavy, but provides good defense. Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

Battle_Armor_Grade_03_Copper_Cold.name: Cold Resistant Metal Armor
Battle_Armor_Grade_03_Copper_Cold.desc: Improved Metal Armor. Useful for surviving in cold climates. Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

Battle_Armor_Grade_03_Copper_Heat.name: Heat Resistant Metal Armor
Battle_Armor_Grade_03_Copper_Heat.desc: Improved Metal Armor. Boasts high heat resistance. Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

Battle_Armor_Grade_03_Iron.name: Refined Metal Armor
Battle_Armor_Grade_03_Iron.desc: Armor made from high quality metal. Quite heavy, but provides excellent defense. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

Battle_Armor_Grade_03_Iron_Cold.name: Cold Resistant Refined Metal Armor
Battle_Armor_Grade_03_Iron_Cold.desc: Improved Refined Metal Armor. Useful for surviving in cold climates. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

Battle_Armor_Grade_03_Iron_Heat.name: Heat Resistant Refined Metal Armor
Battle_Armor_Grade_03_Iron_Heat.desc: Improved Refined Metal Armor. Boasts high heat resistance. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

Battle_Armor_Grade_04_Steal.name: Pal Metal Armor
Battle_Armor_Grade_04_Steal.desc: Armor made from Pal Metal Ingot. High defense, but extremely heavy. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II.

Battle_Armor_Grade_04_Steal_Cold.name: Cold Resistant Pal Metal Armor
Battle_Armor_Grade_04_Steal_Cold.desc: Improved Pal Metal Armor. Useful for surviving in cold climates. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II.

Battle_Armor_Grade_04_Steal_Heat.name: Heat Resistant Pal Metal Armor
Battle_Armor_Grade_04_Steal_Heat.desc: Improved Pal Metal Armor. Boasts high heat resistance. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II.

Battle_Armor_Grade_05_Plastic.name: Plasteel Armor
Battle_Armor_Grade_05_Plastic.desc: Armor made of Plasteel. In addition to enhanced defense capabilities, its weight was also reduced. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II.

Battle_Armor_Grade_05_Plastic_Cold.name: Cold Resistant Plasteel Armor
Battle_Armor_Grade_05_Plastic_Cold.desc: Improved Plasteel Armor. Useful for surviving in cold climates. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II.

Battle_Armor_Grade_05_Plastic_Heat.name: Heat Resistant Plasteel Armor
Battle_Armor_Grade_05_Plastic_Heat.desc: Improved Plasteel Armor. Boasts high heat resistance. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II.

Battle_Armor_Grade_05_Plastic_Weight.name: Lightweight Plasteel Armor
Battle_Armor_Grade_05_Plastic_Weight.desc: Improved Plasteel Armor. Increases carrying capacity. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II.

Battle_Cloth.name: Cloth
Battle_Cloth.desc: Cloth woven from Wool. Required to create armor.

Battle_Defense_BowGun.name: Mounted Crossbow
Battle_Defense_BowGun.desc: Assign a Pal with Handiwork suitability and it will protect a base using the crossbow.

Battle_Defense_MachineGun.name: Mounted Machine Gun
Battle_Defense_MachineGun.desc: Assign a Pal with Handiwork suitability and it will protect a base using the machine gun.

Battle_Defense_Missile.name: Mounted Missile Launcher
Battle_Defense_Missile.desc: Assign a Pal with Handiwork suitability and it will protect a base using the missile launcher.

Battle_Glider_Grade_01.name: Normal Parachute
Battle_Glider_Grade_01.desc: A glider for soaring through the air. Cheaply made, it isn't very fast.

Battle_Glider_Grade_02.name: Mega Glider
Battle_Glider_Grade_02.desc: A glider for soaring through the air. A mass produced commercial model, it’s decently fast. Can be made at High-Quality Workbench.

Battle_Glider_Grade_03.name: Giga Glider
Battle_Glider_Grade_03.desc: A glider for soaring through the air. With its capabilities improved, it can soar at high speed. Can be made at Production Assembly Line

Battle_Glider_Grade_04.name: Hyper Glider
Battle_Glider_Grade_04.desc: A glider for soaring through the air. Its performance has been further improved, with increased speed and lift. Can be made at Production Assembly Line II.

Battle_GunPowder_Grade_02.name: Gunpowder
Battle_GunPowder_Grade_02.desc: Gunpowder used to fire ammunition. Required to make bullets. Can be made at High-Quality Workbench.

Battle_Helm_Grade_02_Fur.name: Feathered Hair Band
Battle_Helm_Grade_02_Fur.desc: A beautiful feathered headband. Though improbable, it somehow seems to protect its wearer from lethal head injuries. Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Battle_Helm_Grade_03_Copper.name: Metal Helm
Battle_Helm_Grade_03_Copper.desc: A helm made of metal. A reliable piece of armor that protects your head, and all the thoughts within. Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

Battle_Helm_Grade_04_Iron.name: Refined Metal Helm
Battle_Helm_Grade_04_Iron.desc: A helm made from high quality metal. The luster from the polished metal gives the wearer that added boost of confidence. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

Battle_Helm_Grade_05_Steal.name: Pal Metal Helm
Battle_Helm_Grade_05_Steal.desc: A helm made from Pal Metal Ingot. Envied for its immaculate quality, it is proof of a chosen warrior. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II.

Battle_Helm_Grade_06_Plastic.name: Plasteel Helmet
Battle_Helm_Grade_06_Plastic.desc: Helmet made of Plasteel. In addition to enhanced defense capabilities, its weight was also reduced. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II.

Battle_MeleeWeapon_Axe_Steal.name: Pal Metal Axe
Battle_MeleeWeapon_Axe_Steal.desc: An axe for chopping wood. It has achieved extraordinary sharpness thanks to Pal Metal.

Battle_MeleeWeapon_Bat.name: Wooden Club
Battle_MeleeWeapon_Bat.desc: A Wooden Club for close range combat. Can beat a small Pal to a pulp if need be.

Battle_MeleeWeapon_Bat2.name: Bat
Battle_MeleeWeapon_Bat2.desc: Baseball bat for close-range combat. Might be tough to get a home run with a Pal.

Battle_MeleeWeapon_Pickaxe_Steal.name: Pal Metal Pickaxe
Battle_MeleeWeapon_Pickaxe_Steal.desc: A pickaxe for mining. It has achieved extraordinary efficiency thanks to Pal Metal.

Battle_MeleeWeapon_Sword.name: Sword
Battle_MeleeWeapon_Sword.desc: Sword for close-range combat. The blade is extremely sharp! Mightier than a pen, for sure. Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

Battle_RangeWeapon_AssaultRifle.name: Assault Rifle
Battle_RangeWeapon_AssaultRifle.desc: An Assault Rifle that mows down enemies with overwhelming force. It excels at rapid-fire and is well suited to taking down powerful foes. Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

Battle_RangeWeapon_Bow1.name: Old Bow
Battle_RangeWeapon_Bow1.desc: Primitive long-range weapon. Hastily put together, it isn't very powerful. Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Battle_RangeWeapon_Bow3.name: Three Shot Bow
Battle_RangeWeapon_Bow3.desc: An enhanced bow that allows three arrows to be fired simultaneously. By some strange mechanism, it only consumes a single Arrow when fired.

Battle_RangeWeapon_BowGun.name: Crossbow
Battle_RangeWeapon_BowGun.desc: Fires an Arrow effortlessly. Though it takes time to load, it delivers a powerful shot. Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

Battle_RangeWeapon_CompoundBow.name: Compound Bow
Battle_RangeWeapon_CompoundBow.desc: A modernized bow. Capable of firing more powerful arrows.

Battle_RangeWeapon_FlameThrower.name: Flamethrower
Battle_RangeWeapon_FlameThrower.desc: Flamethrower that fires long-range flames. Can set the enemy on fire. Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

Battle_RangeWeapon_GatlingGun.name: Gatling Gun
Battle_RangeWeapon_GatlingGun.desc: A Gatling Gun capable of rapid fire. Mows down enemies with suppressive shots. Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

Battle_RangeWeapon_GrenadeLauncher.name: Grenade Launcher
Battle_RangeWeapon_GrenadeLauncher.desc: Fires grenades that cause wide-ranging explosions. Useful when dealing with a large number of enemies. Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

Battle_RangeWeapon_GuidedMissileLauncher.name: Guided Missile Launcher
Battle_RangeWeapon_GuidedMissileLauncher.desc: Fires missiles that automatically track and pursue enemies. Missiles explode upon impact, causing damage over a wide area. Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

Battle_RangeWeapon_HandGun.name: Handgun
Battle_RangeWeapon_HandGun.desc: A handgun with improved capacity and rapid-fire capabilities. Has more immediate firepower than a Makeshift Handgun. Crafted at Weapon Workbench.

Battle_RangeWeapon_HomingSphereLauncher.name: Homing Sphere Launcher
Battle_RangeWeapon_HomingSphereLauncher.desc: A launcher for firing spheres. Fired spheres home in on Pals. Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

Battle_RangeWeapon_LaserRifle.name: Laser Rifle
Battle_RangeWeapon_LaserRifle.desc: A weapon that fires high-energy lasers. It has impressive firepower and is easy to handle. Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

Battle_RangeWeapon_OldRevolver.name: Old Revolver
Battle_RangeWeapon_OldRevolver.desc: A slightly outdated revolving handgun. Compared to Handgun_default, it excels in single-shot power.

Battle_RangeWeapon_Rifle.name: Single-Shot Rifle
Battle_RangeWeapon_Rifle.desc: A single-shot rifle. Takes time to load. What it lacks in capacity, it makes up for with sheer power. Crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

Battle_RangeWeapon_RocketLauncher.name: Rocket Launcher
Battle_RangeWeapon_RocketLauncher.desc: A Rocket Launcher that can fire a powerful round from long distances. Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

Battle_RangeWeapon_SemiAutoRifle.name: Semi-Auto Rifle
Battle_RangeWeapon_SemiAutoRifle.desc: A rifle that allows for a certain degree of rapid fire. It’s easy to aim and has high firepower, making it effective for mid-range combat.

Battle_RangeWeapon_SemiAutoShotgun.name: Semi-Auto Shotgun
Battle_RangeWeapon_SemiAutoShotgun.desc: A rapid-fire shotgun with immense power. Its close-range damage output is top-notch.

Battle_RangeWeapon_ShotGun.name: Double-Barreled Shotgun
Battle_RangeWeapon_ShotGun.desc: Wreaks havoc at close range. Can fire twice before reloading. Despite the limited load capacity, it still packs a punch. Crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

Battle_RangeWeapon_ShotGun_Multi.name: Pump-Action Shotgun
Battle_RangeWeapon_ShotGun_Multi.desc: A high capacity, powerful shotgun. It has outstanding close range DPS. Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

Battle_RangeWeapon_SphereLauncher.name: Scatter Sphere Launcher
Battle_RangeWeapon_SphereLauncher.desc: A new type of launcher that fires a large number of spheres. It can easily capture a herd of Pals. Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

Battle_RangeWeapon_SphereLauncher_Once.name: Single-Shot Sphere Launcher
Battle_RangeWeapon_SphereLauncher_Once.desc: A launcher that fires spheres. It can capture Pals from a greater distance. Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

Battle_RangeWeapon_SubmachineGun.name: SMG
Battle_RangeWeapon_SubmachineGun.desc: A submachine gun with exceptional rate of fire. It’s easy to handle and effective in close-range combat.

BeamLauncher.name: Beam Launcher
BeamLauncher.desc: Fires a high-density beam that causes explosions over a wide area. Caution is required to prevent overheating during rapid fire.

BeamSword.name: Beam Sword
BeamSword.desc: Beam Sword for close-range combat. Slices through opponents, burning them with a high-output laser.

BelieverFlagSet.name: Free Pal Alliance Flag Set
BelieverFlagSet.desc: Free Pal Alliance Standard and Free Pal Alliance Vertical Banner set. Proof of your victory over the Free Pal Alliance.

BlastFurnace4.name: Gigantic Furnace
BlastFurnace4.desc: Allows refinement of Hexolite. By growing in size, multiple Pals can collaborate to perform smelting. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

BreedFarm.name: Breeding Farm
BreedFarm.desc: Assign a male and a female Pal to produce eggs. Cake is required for breeding.

BronzeSword.name: Primitive Sword
BronzeSword.desc: A sword for close-range combat. Not bad for a battered sword. Perfect for getting up close and personal.

BuildableGoddessStatue.name: Statue of Power
BuildableGoddessStatue.desc: Make offerings to enhance the stats of the Player and their Pals.

CarbonFiber.name: Carbon Fiber
CarbonFiber.desc: A lightweight yet sturdy material. Used to create armor among other equipment.

Cauldron.name: Witch Cauldron
Cauldron.desc: Place in base to improve medicine manufacturing speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

CeilingLamp.name: Ceiling Lamp
CeilingLamp.desc: Lights up dark areas below at a base.

Cement.name: Cement
Cement.desc: Cement used for creating structures and more. Can be produced in a High-Quality Workbench.

Cloth2.name: High Quality Cloth
Cloth2.desc: Woven from large amounts of Wool. Required to create high quality armor. Can be made at High-Quality Workbench.

CompositeDesk.name: Drafting Table
CompositeDesk.desc: A facility that lets you combine multiple schematics to create more advanced ones.

Cooler.name: Cooler
Cooler.desc: Cools the nearby area and protects against the heat.

CoolerBox.name: Cooler Box
CoolerBox.desc: Small food vault. Assign an Ice Pal to help prevent food stored inside from spoiling.

CoolerPalFoodBox.name: Cold Food Box
CoolerPalFoodBox.desc: A feeding box that can be kept cold. Assign an Ice Pal to it and the food inside will be less likely to spoil.

Crusher.name: Crusher
Crusher.desc: Facility for breaking down Stone and Wood to exchange them for other materials. Requires Pal with the Watering suitability to spin the water turbine.

DamagedScarecrow.name: Training Dummy
DamagedScarecrow.desc: Training dummy shaped like a Pengullet.

DarkIslandFlagSet.name: Feybreak Flag Set
DarkIslandFlagSet.desc: Feybreak Flag and Feybreak Banner set. Proof of your victory over the Feybreak.

DecalGunSet.name: Decal Gun Set
DecalGunSet.desc: Decal gun set. Allows crafting of a strange gun that paints a Pal decal where it is fired. Required ammo also becomes craftable.

DefenseWait.name: Sandbag
DefenseWait.desc: Pals assigned to it will watch for approaching enemies.

DefenseWall.name: Stone Defensive Wall
DefenseWall.desc: Large defensive wall that protects from enemy invasions.

DefenseWall_Metal.name: Metal Defensive Wall
DefenseWall_Metal.desc: Massive defensive wall to prevent enemy intrusions. Made from metal, it is extremely durable.

DefenseWall_Wood.name: Wooden Defensive Wall
DefenseWall_Wood.desc: Massive defensive wall to prevent enemy intrusions. Made from wood, it breaks easily.

DimensionPalStorage.name: Dimensional Pal Storage
DimensionPalStorage.desc: A facility for storing a large number of captured Pals. Any guild member can deposit or withdraw Pals. If you set it to private, it can serve as your personal Pal storage.

DismantlingConveyor.name: Pal Disassembly Conveyor
DismantlingConveyor.desc: A dream-like facility that automatically butchers any Pal that is placed inside.

DisplayCharacter.name: Viewing Cage
DisplayCharacter.desc: Container for observing captured Pals. Pals inside cannot participate in battle or production, but they do not become hungry.

DroneLauncher.name: Drone Launcher
DroneLauncher.desc: A launcher that fires drones which perform autonomous attacks. Capable of deploying up to 9 units, enabling sustained suppression.

ElecBaton.name: Stun Baton
ElecBaton.desc: Close range weapon that sends out an electric jolt upon contact. Pals are easier to capture when electrocuted. Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

ElectricArcAssaultRifle.name: Plasma Rifle
ElectricArcAssaultRifle.desc: A rifle that releases an electrical discharge from the point of impact, which chains to multiple enemies.

ElectricCooler.name: Electric Cooler
ElectricCooler.desc: Cools the nearby area and protects against the heat. Improved range and cooling capabilities.

ElectricGenerator_Large.name: Large Power Generator
ElectricGenerator_Large.desc: A power generator fueled by Electric Pals. Larger and with improved power generation efficiency.

ElectricHeater.name: Electric Heater
ElectricHeater.desc: Warms the nearby area and protects against the cold. Improved range and heating capabilities.

EnergyLauncherBullet.name: Plasma Cartridge
EnergyLauncherBullet.desc: Ammo for the Plasma Cannon and any similar weapon.

EnergyRocketLauncher.name: Plasma Cannon
EnergyRocketLauncher.desc: Fires high-output energy projectiles. Causes an energy explosion upon impact.

EnergyStorage_Electric.name: Accumulator
EnergyStorage_Electric.desc: A facility for storing excess electricity generated by the Power Generator.

Expedition.name: Pal Expedition Station
Expedition.desc: A facility that allows Pals to be sent on expeditions to places like dungeons. The dispatched Pals engage in battles and gather items, bringing back resources to the base.

Factory_Hard_04.name: Advanced Workshop
Factory_Hard_04.desc: An Assembly Line for producing items and gear. Advanced machinery has been introduced, enabling high-speed production. Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

Factory_Money.name: Gold Coin Assembly Line
Factory_Money.desc: An Assemby Line that manufactures Money. The work puts a strain on the mind, causing a decrease in Pal's SAN value. Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

Farm_SkillFruits.name: Skillfruit Orchard
Farm_SkillFruits.desc: A farm where Skillfruits can be cultivated. By planting the original fruit in the ground, multiple fruits of the same type can be harvested.

FireCultFlagSet.name: Brothers of the Eternal Pyre Flag Set
FireCultFlagSet.desc: Brothers of the Eternal Pyre Standard and Brothers of the Eternal Pyre Vertical Banner set. Proof of your victory over the Brothers of the Eternal Pyre.

FishingSet1.name: Beginner Fishing Set
FishingSet1.desc: Beginner-friendly fishing rod and bait set. Once you craft both, you'll be able to fish for Pals near bodies of water.

FlamethrowerBullet.name: Flamethrower Fuel
FlamethrowerBullet.desc: Flamethrower fuel. Ammo for the Flamethrower and similar weapons.

FlourMill.name: Mill
FlourMill.desc: Facility for milling Wheat to produce Flour. Requires Pal with the Watering suitability to spin the water turbine.

FlowerBed.name: Flower Bed
FlowerBed.desc: Place in base to improve gathering speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

Fountain.name: Water Fountain
Fountain.desc: Place in base to improve watering speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

FragGrenade.name: Frag Grenade
FragGrenade.desc: A Frag Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing damage to enemies.

FragGrenade_Dark.name: Dark Grenade
FragGrenade_Dark.desc: A Dark Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing Dark damage to enemies.

FragGrenade_Dragon.name: Dragon Grenade
FragGrenade_Dragon.desc: A Dragon Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing Dragon damage to enemies.

FragGrenade_Elec.name: Shock Grenade
FragGrenade_Elec.desc: A Shock Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, electrocuting everything in the blast radius.

FragGrenade_Fire.name: Incendiary Grenade
FragGrenade_Fire.desc: A Incendiary Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, setting the surrounding area on fire.

FragGrenade_Ground.name: Ground Grenade
FragGrenade_Ground.desc: A Ground Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing Ground damage to enemies.

FragGrenade_Ice.name: Ice Grenade
FragGrenade_Ice.desc: A Ice Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, freezing the surrounding area.

FragGrenade_Leaf.name: Grass Grenade
FragGrenade_Leaf.desc: A Grass Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing Grass damage to enemies.

FragGrenade_Super.name: Frag Grenade Mk2
FragGrenade_Super.desc: An improved frag grenade. It explodes a few seconds after being thrown, dealing massive damage to enemies.

FragGrenade_Water.name: Water Grenade
FragGrenade_Water.desc: A Water Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing Water damage to enemies.

FurnitureSet_1.name: Wooden Living Room Furniture Set
FurnitureSet_1.desc: Decorative furniture set. Place furniture in your living space and enjoy life with your Pals.

FurnitureSet_10.name: Barricade Set
FurnitureSet_10.desc: Decorative furniture set. Place to keep somewhere off limits.

FurnitureSet_11.name: Traffic Control Set
FurnitureSet_11.desc: Decorative furniture set. No roads mean no traffic control.

FurnitureSet_12.name: Road Sign Set
FurnitureSet_12.desc: Decorative furniture set. No roads mean no traffic control.

FurnitureSet_13.name: Metal Chair and Desk Set
FurnitureSet_13.desc: Decorative furniture set. Match with metal structures and enjoy life with your Pals.

FurnitureSet_14.name: Ironwood Table Set
FurnitureSet_14.desc: Decorative furniture set. Match with metal structures and enjoy life with your Pals.

FurnitureSet_15.name: Piano Furniture Set
FurnitureSet_15.desc: Decorative furniture set. Place in your base and dream about living a life of luxury.

FurnitureSet_16.name: Antique Mirror Set
FurnitureSet_16.desc: Decorative furniture set. Essentially for making sure you look good.

FurnitureSet_17.name: Carpet Set
FurnitureSet_17.desc: Decorative furniture set. Place on a foundation in your base for that homey feel.

FurnitureSet_18.name: Antique Couch Set
FurnitureSet_18.desc: Decorative furniture set. Gives the air of luxury to your base.

FurnitureSet_19.name: Antique Chair Set
FurnitureSet_19.desc: Decorative furniture set. Use with an antique desk.

FurnitureSet_2.name: Wooden Tavern Cabinet Furniture Set
FurnitureSet_2.desc: Set of wooden cabinets that look at home in a tavern. Can store items.

FurnitureSet_20.name: Antique Bath Set
FurnitureSet_20.desc: Decorative furniture set. Can't actually be used to stay clean.

FurnitureSet_21.name: Antique Storage Set
FurnitureSet_21.desc: Antique storage furniture set. Can store items.

FurnitureSet_22.name: Antique Storage Cabinet Set
FurnitureSet_22.desc: Antique storage cabinet set. Can store items.

FurnitureSet_23.name: Clock Set
FurnitureSet_23.desc: Decorative furniture set. Doesn't actually tell time.

FurnitureSet_24.name: Antique Desk Set
FurnitureSet_24.desc: Decorative furniture set. Use with an antique chair.

FurnitureSet_25.name: Bathroom Set
FurnitureSet_25.desc: Decorative furniture set. Can't be used for its original purpose.

FurnitureSet_26.name: Amusement Furniture Set
FurnitureSet_26.desc: Decorative furniture set. Your Pals will keep on working.

FurnitureSet_27.name: Street Lamp Set
FurnitureSet_27.desc: Street lamp set to provide illumination. Requires electricity to light.

FurnitureSet_28.name: Fireplace Set
FurnitureSet_28.desc: Brick fireplace set to provide illumination. Must be lit with fire.

FurnitureSet_29.name: Antique Lamp Set
FurnitureSet_29.desc: Antique lamp set to provide illumination. Requires electricity to light.

FurnitureSet_3.name: Wooden Tavern Furniture Set
FurnitureSet_3.desc: Decorative furniture set. Set up a bar and enjoy life with your Pals.

FurnitureSet_30.name: Metal Shelf Set
FurnitureSet_30.desc: Metal shelf set. Can store items.

FurnitureSet_31.name: Outdoor Furniture Set
FurnitureSet_31.desc: Decorative furniture set. Spruces up the outside of your base.

FurnitureSet_32.name: Antique High Quality Furniture Set
FurnitureSet_32.desc: Decorative furniture set. Gives an air of stately elegance to your base.

FurnitureSet_4.name: Wall-Mounted Houseplant Set
FurnitureSet_4.desc: Decorative furniture set. Place plants on your base's walls for a splash of color.

FurnitureSet_5.name: Metal Barrel Set
FurnitureSet_5.desc: Decorative furniture set. Not suitable for doing keg stands.

FurnitureSet_6.name: Storage Container Set
FurnitureSet_6.desc: Container furniture set. Can store items.

FurnitureSet_7.name: Leather Chair Set
FurnitureSet_7.desc: Decorative furniture set. Leather screams luxury.

FurnitureSet_8.name: Emergency Exit Sign Set
FurnitureSet_8.desc: Decorative furniture set. Apparently a priceless artifact in more civilized times.

FurnitureSet_9.name: Houseplant Set
FurnitureSet_9.desc: Decorative furniture set. Place plants around your base for a splash of color.

FurnitureSet_Japanese.name: Japanese-Style Furniture Set
FurnitureSet_Japanese.desc: Japanese-style decorative furniture set. Transform your base into a traditional Japanese haven.

FurnitureTree_Bamboo.name: Faux Bamboo Set
FurnitureTree_Bamboo.desc: A decorative artificial bamboo set. Use them to create a Bamboo Grove-inspired base. No materials can be obtained from this structure.

FurnitureTree_Cherry.name: Faux Cherry Blossoms Set
FurnitureTree_Cherry.desc: A decorative artificial cherry blossom tree set. Use them to create a Sakurajima-inspired base. No materials can be obtained from this structure.

FurnitureTree_Desert.name: Faux Desert Greenery Set
FurnitureTree_Desert.desc: A decorative artificial desert tree set. Use them to create a oasis-inspired base. No materials can be obtained from this structure.

FurnitureTree_Green.name: Faux Greenery Set
FurnitureTree_Green.desc: A decorative artificial tree set. Use them to create a natural-looking base. No materials can be obtained from this structure.

FurnitureTree_Red.name: Faux Crimson Foliage Set
FurnitureTree_Red.desc: A decorative artificial autumn tree set. Use them to create a natural-looking base. No materials can be obtained from this structure.

FurnitureTree_Snow.name: Faux Snowy Greenery Set
FurnitureTree_Snow.desc: A decorative artificial snow-covered tree set. Use them to create a winte-inspired base. No materials can be obtained from this structure.

FurnitureTree_Tropical.name: Faux Tropical Greenery Set
FurnitureTree_Tropical.desc: A decorative artificial tropical tree set. Use them to create a tropical-inspired base. No materials can be obtained from this structure.

FurnitureTree_Yellow.name: Faux Golden Foliage Set
FurnitureTree_Yellow.desc: A decorative artificial yellow autumn tree set. Use them to create a natural-looking base. No materials can be obtained from this structure.

GatlingBullet.name: Gatling Gun Ammo
GatlingBullet.desc: Ammo for the Gatling Gun and similar weapons.

Glass_houseset.name: Glass Structure Set
Glass_houseset.desc: Set for building bases using glass. Allows building of glass foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

GlobalPalStorage.name: Global Palbox
GlobalPalStorage.desc: A facility that can store the genetic data of Pals and allows you to reconstruct them from this data. The stored genetic data can also be transferred to other worlds.

GrapplingGun.name: Grappling Gun
GrapplingGun.desc: It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target. It allows for easy movement between places with varying elevation.

GrapplingGun2.name: Mega Grappling Gun
GrapplingGun2.desc: It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target. Since it's upgraded, it now has greater range.

GrapplingGun3.name: Giga Grappling Gun
GrapplingGun3.desc: It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target. Using data from prototype versions, its capabilities have been further increased.

GrapplingGun4.name: Hyper Grappling Gun
GrapplingGun4.desc: It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target. As a result of research, it has achieved overwhelming mobility.

GrenadeBullet.name: Grenade Ammo
GrenadeBullet.desc: Ammo for the Grenade Launcher and similar weapons.

GuildChest.name: Guild Chest
GuildChest.desc: A chest that can instantly send and receive items through subspace. The items inside are shared across all bases where it is placed.

HandTorch.name: Hand-Held Torch
HandTorch.desc: Lights up dark areas and keeps you warm. Can also be used for close-range combat in a pinch. Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

HandgunBullet.name: Handgun Ammo
HandgunBullet.desc: Ammo for the Handgun and similar weapons. Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

Headstone.name: Tombstone
Headstone.desc: A gravestone that can be inscribed with text. Use it for recording purposes.

Heater.name: Heater
Heater.desc: Warms the nearby area and protects against the cold.

Homeward.name: Homeward Thundercloud
Homeward.desc: Transports you to the nearest base. Cannot be used in dungeons and other similar locations.

HugeKitchen.name: Large-Scale Stone Oven
HugeKitchen.desc: Needed for cooking food. By becoming larger, multiple Pals can cooperate to cook together. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

HunterFlagSet.name: Rayne Syndicate Flag Set
HunterFlagSet.desc: Rayne Syndicate Standard and Rayne Syndicate Vertical Banner set. Proof of your victory over the Rayne Syndicate.

IceCrusher.name: Cryogenic Crusher
IceCrusher.desc: Facility that crushes Ore and converts it into other materials. Requires a power supply and a Pal with Cooling suitability, but it's very efficient.

Infra_ElectricGenerator_Grade_01.name: Power Generator
Infra_ElectricGenerator_Grade_01.desc: Electric Pals at the base can now store electricity, allowing the use of electric facilities.

Infra_ElectronicCircuit.name: Circuit Board
Infra_ElectronicCircuit.desc: Circuit Board required to create precision equipment. Can be made at Production Assembly Line.

Infra_ItemChest_Grade_01.name: Wooden Chest
Infra_ItemChest_Grade_01.desc: Used to store items. Place at a base and Pals with Transporting suitability will automatically carry items to it.

Infra_ItemChest_Grade_02.name: Metal Chest
Infra_ItemChest_Grade_02.desc: Can be used to store more items. Pals with Transporting suitability will automatically carry items to it.

Infra_ItemChest_Grade_03.name: Refined Metal Chest
Infra_ItemChest_Grade_03.desc: Can be used to store even more items. Pals with Transporting suitability will automatically carry items to it.

Infra_MachineParts.name: Nail
Infra_MachineParts.desc: Necessary for building various facilities. Can be made with a Primitive Workbench.

Infra_PalBed_Grade_01.name: Straw Pal Bed
Infra_PalBed_Grade_01.desc: Pals at base recover SAN when sleeping in beds at night. Without a Pal Bed, Pals cannot sleep soundly, and no SAN is recovered.

Infra_PalBed_Grade_02.name: Fluffy Pal Bed
Infra_PalBed_Grade_02.desc: Pals sleep more soundly, improving the amount of Health and SAN recovered while sleeping.

Infra_PlayerBed_Grade_01.name: Shoddy Bed
Infra_PlayerBed_Grade_01.desc: Human bed. Sleeping restores Health. Sleep at night and time will pass until morning. Cannot sleep unless built under a roof.

Infra_PlayerBed_Grade_02.name: Fine Bed
Infra_PlayerBed_Grade_02.desc: Soft bed with improved restorative capabilities. Cannot sleep unless built under a roof.

ItemBooth.name: Flea Market (Items)
ItemBooth.desc: A facility for selling items. By setting products in the sales list, you can sell items to other players. Assign an Ice Pal to it and the food inside will be less likely to spoil.

ItemChest_04.name: Advanced Chest
ItemChest_04.desc: Stores items. Quite sturdy, with plenty of storage space. It is useful as a large, secure storage box.

JapaneseStyle_houseset.name: Japanese-Style Structure Set
JapaneseStyle_houseset.desc: Set for building bases using Japanese-style architecture. Allows building of Japanese-style foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

Katana.name: Katana
Katana.desc: Katana for close-range combat. Slices through with razor-sharp precision, cutting cleanly in one strike.

Lab.name: Pal Labor Research Lab
Lab.desc: A facility for conducting research on the various tasks of Pals. By assigning tasks to Pals in this facility, research progresses, granting various benefits.

Lamp.name: Lamp
Lamp.desc: Lights up dark areas at a base.

Lantern.name: Hip Lantern
Lantern.desc: A lantern that can be attached to the hip. It lights up automatically at night. Just one is enough to find your way in the dark.

LargeCeilingLamp.name: Large Ceiling Lamp
LargeCeilingLamp.desc: Lights up large areas below at a base.

LargeLamp.name: Large Mounted Lamp
LargeLamp.desc: Lights up large areas at a base.

LaserBullet.name: Energy Cartridge
LaserBullet.desc: Ammo used by the Laser Rifle and similar weapons.

LaserGatlingBullet.name: Laser Gatling Cartridge
LaserGatlingBullet.desc: Ammo for the Laser Gatling Gun and any similar weapon.

LaserGatlingGun.name: Laser Gatling Gun
LaserGatlingGun.desc: Fires beam-like energy blasts at high speed. Its overwhelming firepower can take down multple enemies at once.

LaserMiningTool.name: Plasma Multicutter
LaserMiningTool.desc: A portable plasma cutter that concentrates and emits plasma energy. It supports a wide range of uses, from ore excavation to tree cutting. Its high-output energy also allows for the mining of special ores.

LauncherBullet.name: Rocket Ammo
LauncherBullet.desc: Ammo for the Rocket Launcher and similar weapons. Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

Launcher_Meteor.name: Meteor Launcher
Launcher_Meteor.desc: A phenomenal weapon that fires a meteor. Upon striking its target, it creates an explosion similar to a meteorite impact. Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

MakeshiftAssaultRifle.name: Makeshift Assault Rifle
MakeshiftAssaultRifle.desc: An assault rifle handmade from scraps. It excels in rate of fire and long range, but its single-shot power is low.

MakeshiftHandgun.name: Makeshift Handgun
MakeshiftHandgun.desc: A handgun created from spare parts. Relatively well suited for close quarters combat, but can only fire one shot before needing to reload. Crafted at Weapon Workbench.

MakeshiftShotgun.name: Makeshift Shotgun
MakeshiftShotgun.desc: A shotgun handmade from scraps. It has a short range but excels in close-range combat

MakeshiftSubmachineGun.name: Makeshift SMG
MakeshiftSubmachineGun.desc: A submachine gun handmade from scraps. It excels in rate of fire, but its single-shot power is low.

ManualElectricGenerator.name: Human-Powered Generator
ManualElectricGenerator.desc: A facility that converts rotational motion into electrical energy. The efficiency is low, and the Pals working here will experience a decrease in SAN value, but they will gain experience points.

MeatCutterKnife.name: Meat Cleaver
MeatCutterKnife.desc: Knife for butchering Pals. When equipped, the Pet command becomes Butcher. Butchered Pals will be gone for good.

MedicalPalBed_04.name: Large Pal Bed
MedicalPalBed_04.desc: A fluffy bed that Pals can get a good rest on. Pals can rest on it when injured, or to sleep at night. Even large Pals can sleep soundly on a bed like this.

MedicalPalBed_05.name: Pal Pod
MedicalPalBed_05.desc: A healing pod for Pals. Used when Pals are injured or to rest at night. Thanks to technological advancements, the healing amount has increased.

MedicineFacility_03.name: Advanced Medicine Workbench
MedicineFacility_03.desc: A facility for making medicine to cure Pals' illnesses. With advanced technology, it can also create unknown medicines. Assign the task to a Pal capable of pharmacy work.

MetalDetector.name: Metal Detector
MetalDetector.desc: Holding it allows you to detect hidden ores nearby. It marks the metal when close to the ore, but the mark disappears if you move away.

Metal_Gate.name: Iron Gate
Metal_Gate.desc: Metal gate large enough for big Pals to pass through.

Metal_houseset.name: Metal Structure Set
Metal_houseset.desc: Set for building bases using metal. Allows building of metal foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

MiningTool.name: Mining Cart
MiningTool.desc: Place in base to improve mining speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

MissileBullet.name: Missile Ammo
MissileBullet.desc: Ammo for the Guided Missile Launcher and similar weapons.

MonsterFarm.name: Ranch
MonsterFarm.desc: Ranch for raising sheep and fowl-like Pals. Assign Pals with the appropriate work suitability to the ranch to automatically produce items.

MultiElectricHatchingPalEgg.name: Large-Scale Electric Egg Incubator
MultiElectricHatchingPalEgg.desc: Device for incubating Pal eggs. While power supply is required, it allows multiple eggs to be incubated simultaneously at the optimal temperature.

Musket.name: Musket
Musket.desc: Simple, old-fashioned gun. Fires a single, powerful shot at the expense of a long reload time. Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

NinjaFlagSet.name: Moonflower Flag Set
NinjaFlagSet.desc: Moonflower Standard and Moonflower Vertical Banner set. Proof of your victory over the Moonflowers.

OctaviaSet01.name: ULTRAKILL Collab Set 1
OctaviaSet01.desc: [ULTRAKILL Collab] A set containing V1 Armor and Marksman Revolver.

OctaviaSet02.name: ULTRAKILL Collab Set 2
OctaviaSet02.desc: [ULTRAKILL Collab] A set containing V2 Armor and Core Eject Shotgun.

OilPump.name: Crude Oil Extractor
OilPump.desc: Equipment required to extract Crude Oil from oil fields. Requires a power supply to operate.

OlympicCauldron.name: Flame Cauldron
OlympicCauldron.desc: Place in base to improve fire-making speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

OperatingTable.name: Pal Surgery Table
OperatingTable.desc: A facility where surgery can be performed on Pals to change their gender or passive skills.

PALBOX.name: Palbox
PALBOX.desc: Facility for storing captured Pals. Pals inside gradually recover Health. The area around this structure will become your base.

PalBooth.name: Flea Market (Pals)
PalBooth.desc: A facility for selling Pals. By setting Pals in the sales list, you can sell them to other players. Assign an Ice Pal to it and the food inside will be less likely to spoil.

PalFoodBox.name: Feed Box
PalFoodBox.desc: Place food here, and Pals at the base will eat from it.

PalMedicineBox.name: Medicine Rack
PalMedicineBox.desc: A shelf for storing medicine. Sick Pals will come here to take their medicine. Be sure to keep the medicine stocked.

PalRevive.name: Revival Potion
PalRevive.desc: A potion that revives a Pal that has been injured and is unable to move.

PalSphere_Ancient_1.name: Sol Sphere
PalSphere_Ancient_1.desc: An item that captures Pals when thrown. A high-grade Sphere from an ancient civilization that secured coexistence with Pals.

PalSphere_Ancient_2.name: Ancient Sphere
PalSphere_Ancient_2.desc: A tool that captures Pals when thrown. An ultimate Sphere created as the pinnacle of an ancient civilization, imbued with the power of the World Tree.

PalSphere_Exotic.name: Exotic Sphere
PalSphere_Exotic.desc: An item that captures Pals when thrown. Boasting incredible performance, it can capture Pals that fall outside regular standards.

Plastic.name: Plasteel
Plastic.desc: Plasteel created by processing Crude Oil and metal. Can be produced in a Electric Furnace.

PoliceFlagSet.name: PIDF Flag Set
PoliceFlagSet.desc: PIDF Standard and PIDF Vertical Banner set. Proof of your victory over the PIDF.

Polymer.name: Polymer
Polymer.desc: Made from refined oil. Required for producing various advanced items such as rifles.

Potion_Extreme.name: Advanced Recovery Meds
Potion_Extreme.desc: Medicine that heals wounds over time. Extremely high quality, it rapidly restores HP before your eyes.

Product_Axe_Grade_01.name: Stone Axe
Product_Axe_Grade_01.desc: An axe for cutting wood. Made from stone, it's not very sharp.

Product_Axe_Grade_02.name: Metal Axe
Product_Axe_Grade_02.desc: A metal axe capable of cutting down even hard trees. Effective against the sturdy trees that grow deep within the continent. Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

Product_Axe_Grade_03.name: Refined Metal Axe
Product_Axe_Grade_03.desc: An axe that can gather Hardwood from trees found in harsh environments such as deserts and volcanic areas. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

Product_CoalPit.name: Coal Quarry
Product_CoalPit.desc: Facility for producing Coal. Digging Coal is grueling physical work. Leave it to a Pal that is good at mining.

Product_Cooking_Grade_01.name: Campfire
Product_Cooking_Grade_01.desc: Used to make simple food or provide meager warmth and light.

Product_Cooking_Grade_02.name: Cooking Pot
Product_Cooking_Grade_02.desc: Can efficiently prepare more varieties of foods.

Product_Cooking_Grade_03.name: Electric Kitchen
Product_Cooking_Grade_03.desc: Needs electricity but can prepare high-quality food more efficiently. Requires Pal with Kindling suitability.

Product_CopperPit.name: Ore Mining Site
Product_CopperPit.desc: Facility for producing Ore. Mining Ore is hard work that requires physical endurance. Leave it to Pals skilled at mining.

Product_CopperPit_2.name: Ore Mining Site II
Product_CopperPit_2.desc: Facility for producing large quantities of Ore. Mining Ore is hard work that requires physical endurance. Leave it to Pals skilled at mining.

Product_Factory_Hard_Grade_01.name: High-Quality Workbench
Product_Factory_Hard_Grade_01.desc: Produces faster than Primitive Workbench. Requires Pal with Handiwork trait.

Product_Factory_Hard_Grade_02.name: Production Assembly Line
Product_Factory_Hard_Grade_02.desc: Needs electricity but produces items at a faster pace. Requires Pal with Handiwork trait.

Product_Factory_Hard_Grade_03.name: Production Assembly Line II
Product_Factory_Hard_Grade_03.desc: Needs electricity but produces items at an even faster pace. Requires Pal with Handiwork trait.

Product_Farm_Berries.name: Berry Plantation
Product_Farm_Berries.desc: Can produce berries at a base. Requires Pal with Planting, Watering, and Gathering suitabilities.

Product_Farm_Carrot.name: Carrot Plantation
Product_Farm_Carrot.desc: A farm where you can grow Carrot. It takes time to harvest, but increases the variety of meals you can prepare. Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest the crops.

Product_Farm_Lettuce.name: Lettuce Plantation
Product_Farm_Lettuce.desc: Farm for producing lettuce. Requires Pal with Planting, Watering, and Gathering suitabilities.

Product_Farm_Onion.name: Onion Plantation
Product_Farm_Onion.desc: A farm where you can grow Onion. It takes time to harvest, but increases the variety of meals you can prepare. Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest the crops.

Product_Farm_Potato.name: Potato Plantation
Product_Farm_Potato.desc: A farm where you can grow Potato. It takes time to harvest, but increases the variety of meals you can prepare. Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest the crops.

Product_Farm_tomato.name: Tomato Plantation
Product_Farm_tomato.desc: Farm for producing tomatoes. Requires Pal with Planting, Watering, and Gathering suitabilities.

Product_Farm_wheat.name: Wheat Plantation
Product_Farm_wheat.desc: Use it to grow ingredients for Bread. Requires Pal with Planting, Watering, and Gathering suitabilities.

Product_Ingot_Grade_02_Iron.name: Improved Furnace
Product_Ingot_Grade_02_Iron.desc: Uses Ore and Coal to produce Refined Ingots.

Product_Ingot_Grade_03_Steal.name: Electric Furnace
Product_Ingot_Grade_03_Steal.desc: Allows refinement of Pal Metal Ingot.

Product_Medicine_Grade_01.name: Medieval Medicine Workbench
Product_Medicine_Grade_01.desc: Can produce simple medicine. Requires Pal with Medicine Production trait.

Product_Medicine_Grade_02.name: Electric Medicine Workbench
Product_Medicine_Grade_02.desc: Needs electricity but can produce higher-quality medicine. Requires Pal with Medicine Production trait.

Product_Pickaxe_Grade_01.name: Stone Pickaxe
Product_Pickaxe_Grade_01.desc: A pickaxe used for mining. Made from stone, the efficiency is questionable.

Product_Pickaxe_Grade_02.name: Metal Pickaxe
Product_Pickaxe_Grade_02.desc: A pickaxe used for mining. Made from metal, its durability and efficiency have improved. Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

Product_Pickaxe_Grade_03.name: Refined Metal Pickaxe
Product_Pickaxe_Grade_03.desc: A pickaxe used for mining. Its durability and efficiency have further improved. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

Product_QuartzPit.name: Pure Quartz Quarry
Product_QuartzPit.desc: A facility for producing Pure Quartz. Mining Pure Quartz is hard work that requires physical endurance. Leave it to Pals skilled at mining.

Product_StationDeforest.name: Logging Site
Product_StationDeforest.desc: Can produce wood at a base. Requires Pal with Lumbering suitability.

Product_StonePit.name: Stone Pit
Product_StonePit.desc: Can produce stone at a base. Requires Pal with Mining suitability.

Product_SulfurPit.name: Sulfur Quarry
Product_SulfurPit.desc: Facility for producing Sulfur. Digging Sulfur is grueling physical work. Leave it to a Pal that is good at mining.

Product_WeaponFactory_Dirty_Grade_01.name: Weapon Workbench
Product_WeaponFactory_Dirty_Grade_01.desc: Produces simple mechanical weapons. Requires Pal with Handiwork suitability.

Product_WeaponFactory_Dirty_Grade_02.name: Weapon Assembly Line
Product_WeaponFactory_Dirty_Grade_02.desc: Needs electricity but produces weapons and ammunition at a faster pace. Requires Pal with Handiwork trait.

Product_WeaponFactory_Dirty_Grade_03.name: Weapon Assembly Line II
Product_WeaponFactory_Dirty_Grade_03.desc: Needs electricity but produces weapons and ammunition at an even faster pace. Requires Pal with Handiwork trait.

Product_WorkBench_SkillUnlock.name: Pal Gear Workbench
Product_WorkBench_SkillUnlock.desc: Produces items that allow Pals to use Partner Skills.

Refrigerator.name: Refrigerator
Refrigerator.desc: Large food vault. Assign an Ice Pal to help prevent food stored inside from spoiling.

ReinforcedArrow.name: Reinforced Arrow
ReinforcedArrow.desc: Enhanced arrows designed for use with the Compound Bow.

RifleBullet.name: Rifle Ammo
RifleBullet.desc: Ammo for the Single-Shot Rifle and similar weapons. Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

RoughBullet.name: Coarse Ammo
RoughBullet.desc: Ammo for the Musket, Makeshift Handgun, and similar weapons. Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

SFArmor.name: Hexolite Armor
SFArmor.desc: Armor made of Hexolite. Possesses overwhelming durability and defense.

SFArmorCold.name: Cold Resistant Hexolite Armor
SFArmorCold.desc: Improved Hexolite Armor. Useful for surviving in cold climates.

SFArmorHeat.name: Heat Resistant Hexolite Armor
SFArmorHeat.desc: Improved Hexolite Armor. Boasts high heat resistance.

SFArmorWeight.name: Lightweight Hexolite Armor
SFArmorWeight.desc: Improved Hexolite Armor. Increases carrying capacity.

SFArrow.name: Advanced Arrow
SFArrow.desc: Arrows made of Hexolite material, designed for use with the Advanced Bow.

SFBow.name: Advanced Bow
SFBow.desc: A bow reconstructed with advanced technology. Capable of firing extremely powerful arrows.

SFHelmet.name: Hexolite Helmet
SFHelmet.desc: Helmet made of Hexolite. Combines incredible strength and lightness.

SF_houseset.name: Futuristic Structure Set
SF_houseset.desc: Set for building bases using futuristic architecture. Allows building of futuristic foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

SanityDecrease1.name: Alpha Wave Generator
SanityDecrease1.desc: A device that generates alpha waves to relax Pals. It slows the rate at which the SAN value of allies at the base decreases. Placing more than two will not have any additional effect.

ScientistFlagSet.name: PAL Genetic Research Unit Flag Set
ScientistFlagSet.desc: PAL Genetic Research Unit Standard and PAL Genetic Research Unit Vertical Banner set. Proof of your victory over the PAL Genetic Research Unit.

Shield_01.name: Common Shield
Shield_01.desc: Strange shield made with Paldium technology. It automatically repair itself after not taking damage for a while.

Shield_02.name: Mega Shield
Shield_02.desc: Strange shield made with Paldium technology. The new model has been improved, enhancing its defense. Can be made at High-Quality Workbench.

Shield_03.name: Giga Shield
Shield_03.desc: Strange shield made with Paldium technology. Modifications have enhanced its effectiveness even further. Can be made at Production Assembly Line.

Shield_04.name: Hyper Shield
Shield_04.desc: Strange shield made with Paldium technology. Through repeated testing, the highest quality has been achieved. Can be made at Production Assembly Line II.

Shield_05.name: Ultra Shield
Shield_05.desc: Strange shield made with Paldium technology. As a result of further experiments, ultimate quality has been achieved. Can be made at Production Assembly Line II.

Shield_SF.name: Advanced Shield
Shield_SF.desc: Strange shield made with advanced technology. It automatically repair itself after not taking damage for a while.

ShotGunBullet.name: Shotgun Shell
ShotGunBullet.desc: Ammo for shotguns and other similar weapons. Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

Silo.name: Silo
Silo.desc: Place in base to improve planting speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

SkillUnlock_AmaterasuWolf_Dark.name: Kitsun Noct Saddle
SkillUnlock_AmaterasuWolf_Dark.desc: Saddle for safely riding Kitsun Noct.

SkillUnlock_BadCatgirl.name: Nyafia's Shotgun
SkillUnlock_BadCatgirl.desc: A shotgun for Nyafia to hold. Activate its Partner Skill, and Nyafia will unleash a barrage of shotgun blasts at nearby enemies.

SkillUnlock_BirdDragon_Ice.name: Vanwyrm Cryst Saddle
SkillUnlock_BirdDragon_Ice.desc: Saddle for safely riding Vanwyrm Cryst.

SkillUnlock_BlackPuppy.name: Smokie's Harness
SkillUnlock_BlackPuppy.desc: Harness for Smokie. Activate its Partner Skill to detect the location of nearby Chromite.

SkillUnlock_Carbunclo.name: Lifmunk's Submachine Gun
SkillUnlock_Carbunclo.desc: Submachine gun made specifically for Lifmunk. Activate its Partner Skill, and Lifmunk will ride on your head and fire at enemies.

SkillUnlock_ColorfulBird.name: Tocotoco's Gloves
SkillUnlock_ColorfulBird.desc: Gloves for gently holding Tocotoco. Activate its Partner Skill to hold Tocotoco and use it to fire explosive eggs.

SkillUnlock_Deer_Ground.name: Eikthyrdeer Terra Saddle
SkillUnlock_Deer_Ground.desc: Saddle for safely riding Eikthyrdeer Terra.

SkillUnlock_ElecPanda.name: Grizzbolt's Minigun
SkillUnlock_ElecPanda.desc: Makes Grizzbolt fire a minigun when ridden.

SkillUnlock_FairyDragon_Water.name: Elphidran Aqua Saddle
SkillUnlock_FairyDragon_Water.desc: Saddle for safely riding Elphidran Aqua.

SkillUnlock_FengyunDeeper_Electric.name: Fenglope Lux Saddle
SkillUnlock_FengyunDeeper_Electric.desc: Saddle for safely riding Fenglope Lux.

SkillUnlock_FireKirin_Dark.name: Pyrin Noct Saddle
SkillUnlock_FireKirin_Dark.desc: Saddle for safely riding Pyrin Noct.

SkillUnlock_FlowerDinosaur_Electric.name: Dinossom Lux Saddle
SkillUnlock_FlowerDinosaur_Electric.desc: Saddle for safely riding Dinossom Lux.

SkillUnlock_GrassMammoth_Ice.name: Mammorest Cryst Saddle
SkillUnlock_GrassMammoth_Ice.desc: Saddle for safely riding Mammorest Cryst.

SkillUnlock_GrassPanda.name: Mossanda's Grenade Launcher
SkillUnlock_GrassPanda.desc: Makes Mossanda fire a grenade launcher when ridden.

SkillUnlock_GrassPanda_Electric.name: Mossanda Lux's Grenade Launcher
SkillUnlock_GrassPanda_Electric.desc: Makes Mossanda Lux fire a grenade launcher when ridden.

SkillUnlock_HadesBird_Electric.name: Helzephyr Lux Saddle
SkillUnlock_HadesBird_Electric.desc: Saddle for safely riding Helzephyr Lux.

SkillUnlock_Horus_Water.name: Faleris Aqua Saddle
SkillUnlock_Horus_Water.desc: Saddle for safely riding Faleris Aqua.

SkillUnlock_IceHorse_Dark.name: Frostallion Noct Saddle
SkillUnlock_IceHorse_Dark.desc: Saddle for safely riding Frostallion Noct.

SkillUnlock_JetDragon.name: Jetragon's Missile Launcher
SkillUnlock_JetDragon.desc: Makes Jetragon fire missiles when ridden.

SkillUnlock_KingAlpaca_Ice.name: Kingpaca Cryst Saddle
SkillUnlock_KingAlpaca_Ice.desc: Saddle for safely riding Kingpaca Cryst.

SkillUnlock_KingBahamut_Dragon.name: Blazamut Ryu Saddle
SkillUnlock_KingBahamut_Dragon.desc: Saddle for safely riding Blazamut Ryu.

SkillUnlock_Kitsunebi.name: Foxparks' Harness
SkillUnlock_Kitsunebi.desc: Harness for holding Foxparks. Activate its Partner Skill to hold Foxparks and attack using it as a flamethrower.

SkillUnlock_Kitsunebi_Ice.name: Foxparks Cryst's Harness
SkillUnlock_Kitsunebi_Ice.desc: Harness for holding Foxparks Cryst. Activate its Partner Skill to hold Foxparks Cryst and release freezing air to attack.

SkillUnlock_LazyDragon.name: Relaxaurus' Missile Launcher
SkillUnlock_LazyDragon.desc: Makes Relaxaurus fire a missile launcher when ridden.

SkillUnlock_LazyDragon_Electric.name: Relaxaurus Lux's Missile Launcher
SkillUnlock_LazyDragon_Electric.desc: Makes Relaxaurus Lux fire a missile launcher when ridden.

SkillUnlock_Manticore_Dark.name: Blazehowl Noct Saddle
SkillUnlock_Manticore_Dark.desc: Saddle for safely riding Blazehowl Noct.

SkillUnlock_Monkey.name: Tanzee's Assault Rifle
SkillUnlock_Monkey.desc: Assault rifle made specifically for Tanzee. Activate its Partner Skill, and Tanzee will enter gunner mode and begin shooting at nearby enemies.

SkillUnlock_MushroomDragon_Dark.name: Shroomer Noct Saddle
SkillUnlock_MushroomDragon_Dark.desc: Saddle for safely riding Shroomer Noct.

SkillUnlock_Penguin.name: Pengullet Rocket Launcher
SkillUnlock_Penguin.desc: Rocket launcher for launching Pengullet. Activate its Partner Skill to fire Pengullet and damage enemies. After firing, Pengullet will become incapacitated.

SkillUnlock_SakuraSaurus_Water.name: Broncherry Aqua Saddle
SkillUnlock_SakuraSaurus_Water.desc: Saddle for safely riding Broncherry Aqua.

SkillUnlock_Serpent_Ground.name: Surfent Terra Saddle
SkillUnlock_Serpent_Ground.desc: Saddle for safely riding Surfent Terra.

SkillUnlock_SkyDragon_Grass.name: Quivern Botan Saddle
SkillUnlock_SkyDragon_Grass.desc: Saddle for safely riding Quivern Botan.

SkillUnlock_Suzaku_Water.name: Suzaku Aqua Saddle
SkillUnlock_Suzaku_Water.desc: Saddle for safely riding Suzaku Aqua.

SkillUnlock_Umihebi_Fire.name: Jormuntide Ignis Saddle
SkillUnlock_Umihebi_Fire.desc: Saddle for safely riding Jormuntide Ignis.

SkillUnlock_VolcanicMonster_Ice.name: Reptyro Cryst Saddle
SkillUnlock_VolcanicMonster_Ice.desc: Saddle for safely riding Reptyro Cryst.

SkillUnlock_WeaselDragon_Fire.name: Chillet Ignis Saddle
SkillUnlock_WeaselDragon_Fire.desc: Saddle for safely riding Chillet Ignis.

SkillUnlock_Yeti_Grass.name: Wumpo Botan Saddle
SkillUnlock_Yeti_Grass.desc: Saddle for safely riding Wumpo Botan.

SkinChange.name: Pal Dressing Facility
SkinChange.desc: Pal Dressing Facility. Give your Pals a new look! Skins obtained inside and outside the game can be applied here!

SkyAssaultRifle.name: Heavy Assault Rifle
SkyAssaultRifle.desc: Ammo for the Heavy Assault Rifle. Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

SkyBeamSword.name: Laser Sword
SkyBeamSword.desc: A Beam Sword made from Soralite Ingots. A close-range weapon that instantly cuts targets using its high-output energy blade.

SkyBow.name: Mechanical Bow
SkyBow.desc: A bow crafted from Soralite Ingots. With greatly enhanced initial velocity and piercing power, this high-precision weapon excels at ranged combat.

SkyGrenadeLauncher.name: Tactical Grenade Launcher
SkyGrenadeLauncher.desc: Ammo for the Tactical Grenade Launcher. Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

SkyIslandFlagSet.name: Azure Covenant Flag Set
SkyIslandFlagSet.desc: Azure Covenant Flag and Azure Covenant Banner set. Proof of your victory over the Azure Covenant.

SkyShotgun.name: Prototype Shotgun
SkyShotgun.desc: Ammo for the Prototype Shotgun. Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

SkySubmachineGun.name: Combat SMG
SkySubmachineGun.desc: Ammo for the Combat SMG. Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

Snowman.name: Snowman
Snowman.desc: Place in base to improve cooling speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

Spa.name: Hot Spring
Spa.desc: Pals recover SAN while in a Hot Spring.

Spa2.name: High Quality Hot Spring
Spa2.desc: Pals recover plenty of SAN while in the hot spring.

Spear.name: Stone Spear
Spear.desc: Useful for close-range combat. Its length allows you to stand further away when attacking.

Spear_2.name: Metal Spear
Spear_2.desc: Useful for close-range combat. The metal tip gives it increased attack power. Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

Spear_3.name: Refined Metal Spear
Spear_3.desc: Useful for close-range combat. The high-quality metal tip gives it increased attack power. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

Spear_ForestBoss.name: Lily's Spear
Spear_ForestBoss.desc: The spear cherished by Lily. Punishes those who neglect their Pals.

Spear_ForestBoss2.name: Enhanced Lily's Spear
Spear_ForestBoss2.desc: An enhanced version of Lily's beloved spear. Pierces those who neglect their Pals.

Special_ElectricHatchingPalEgg.name: Electric Egg Incubator
Special_ElectricHatchingPalEgg.desc: Device for incubating Pal eggs. Requires electricity, but automatically keeps the inside of the incubator at appropriate temperatures.

Special_HatchingPalEgg.name: Egg Incubator
Special_HatchingPalEgg.desc: Place a Pal Egg inside to incubate it.

Special_PalRankUp.name: Pal Essence Condenser
Special_PalRankUp.desc: Combines several Pals of the same type to create a higher-ranked version.

Special_PalSphere_Grade_01.name: Pal Sphere
Special_PalSphere_Grade_01.desc: An item that captures Pals when thrown. This basic model is only effective on low level Pals.

Special_PalSphere_Grade_02.name: Mega Sphere
Special_PalSphere_Grade_02.desc: An item that captures Pals when thrown. Its capabilities have been improved, allowing it to catch a wider range of Pals. Can be crafted at Sphere Workbench.

Special_PalSphere_Grade_03.name: Giga Sphere
Special_PalSphere_Grade_03.desc: An item that captures Pals when thrown. Able to capture moderately powerful Pals. Can be crafted at Sphere Workbench.

Special_PalSphere_Grade_04.name: Hyper Sphere
Special_PalSphere_Grade_04.desc: An item that captures Pals when thrown. Enhanced capabilities allow it to capture even more powerful Pals. Can be crafted at Sphere Assembly Line.

Special_PalSphere_Grade_05.name: Ultra Sphere
Special_PalSphere_Grade_05.desc: An item that captures Pals when thrown. Not many Pals can escape its highly efficient design. Can be crafted at Sphere Assembly Line II.

Special_PalSphere_Grade_06.name: Legendary Sphere
Special_PalSphere_Grade_06.desc: An item that captures Pals when thrown. Very few Pals can escape its perfected design. Can be crafted at Sphere Assembly Line II.

Special_PalSphere_Grade_07.name: Ultimate Sphere
Special_PalSphere_Grade_07.desc: An item that captures Pals when thrown. Almost no Pals can escape its flawless design. Can be crafted at Sphere Assembly Line II.

Special_SphereFactory_Black_Grade_01.name: Sphere Workbench
Special_SphereFactory_Black_Grade_01.desc: Produces Spheres for capturing Pals. Requires Pal with Handiwork suitability.

Special_SphereFactory_Black_Grade_02.name: Sphere Assembly Line
Special_SphereFactory_Black_Grade_02.desc: Creates Pal Spheres at a faster pace. Requires Pal with Handiwork suitability.

Special_SphereFactory_Black_Grade_03.name: Sphere Assembly Line II
Special_SphereFactory_Black_Grade_03.desc: Creates Pal Spheres at an even faster pace. Requires Pal with Handiwork suitability.

SphereFactory_Black_04.name: Advanced Sphere Assembly Line
SphereFactory_Black_04.desc: An Assembly Line for producing spheres used for capturing Pals. Advanced machinery has been introduced, allowing for the production of spheres at high speed. Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

SphereModule_Curve.name: Curve Module
SphereModule_Curve.desc: Equipping it causes the sphere to spin with a curved trajectory. It becomes easier to catch Pals off guard, and increases capture power.

SphereModule_Curve2.name: Slider Module
SphereModule_Curve2.desc: Equipping it adds a slider spin to the sphere. The sphere curves at a sharp angle, making it easier to catch Pals off guard and increasing capture power.

SphereModule_Heavy.name: Heavy Weight Module
SphereModule_Heavy.desc: Equipping it makes the sphere heavier, reducing its range but increasing its capture power.

SphereModule_Homing.name: Homing Module
SphereModule_Homing.desc: Equipping it makes the sphere home in on Pals, further increasing capture power.

SphereModule_Sniper.name: Sniper Module
SphereModule_Sniper.desc: Equipping it increases the sphere's range, allowing it to sharply capture Pals and enhancing capture power.

SphereModule_Sniper2.name: Sniper Module II
SphereModule_Sniper2.desc: Equipping it significantly increases the sphere's range, allowing it to sharply capture Pals and enhancing capture power.

StainlessSteel.name: Hexolite
StainlessSteel.desc: An alloy of Chromite, Ingot, and Hexolite Quartz. Used as materials for advanced equipment and structures.

Stone_Gate.name: Stone Gate
Stone_Gate.desc: Stone gate large enough for big Pals to pass through.

Stone_houseset.name: Stone Structure Set
Stone_houseset.desc: Set for building bases using stone. Allows building of stone foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

Stump.name: Stump and Axe
Stump.desc: Place in base to improve logging speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

TableCircular.name: Tidy Table Set
TableCircular.desc: A neat decorative table set for building a clean and well-kept base.

TableDresser01_Stone.name: Antique Dresser
TableDresser01_Stone.desc: Dresser useful for giving yourself a remake. Allows players to edit their appearance.

ToolBoxV1.name: Large Toolbox
ToolBoxV1.desc: Place in base to improve handiwork speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

Torch.name: Mounted Torch
Torch.desc: Place it at a base to light the surrounding area.

TransmissionTower.name: Electric Pylon
TransmissionTower.desc: Place in base to improve electricity generating speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

Trap_LegHold.name: Bear Trap (Small)
Trap_LegHold.desc: Immobilizes those who step on it. Only effective on small Pals or humans.

Trap_LegHold_Big.name: Bear Trap (Large)
Trap_LegHold_Big.desc: Immobilizes those who step on it. Only effective on large Pals.

Trap_MineElecShock.name: Electric Mine
Trap_MineElecShock.desc: Electrocutes those who step on it. Electrocuted Pals are easier to capture.

Trap_MineFreeze.name: Ice Mine
Trap_MineFreeze.desc: Freezes those who step on it. Frozen Pals are easier to capture.

Trap_Noose.name: Hanging Trap
Trap_Noose.desc: Catches Pals that pass through. Only effective on small Pals and humans.

Unlock_Picking_Tier1.name: Lockpicking Tool v1
Unlock_Picking_Tier1.desc: No key? No problem! These tools will allow you to try and pry open any treasure chest that would normally require a Copper Key.

Unlock_Picking_Tier2.name: Lockpicking Tool v2
Unlock_Picking_Tier2.desc: No key? No problem! These tools will allow you to try and pry open any treasure chest that would normally require a Silver Key.

Unlock_Picking_Tier3.name: Lockpicking Tool v3
Unlock_Picking_Tier3.desc: No key? No problem! These tools will allow you to try and pry open any treasure chest that would normally require a Gold Key.

WallSignboard.name: Wall-Mounted Sign
WallSignboard.desc: A signboard to write on. Can be hung on walls.

WallTorch.name: Wall Torch
WallTorch.desc: Place it on a wall to light the surrounding area.

WaterBuildKit.name: Aquatic Construction Kit
WaterBuildKit.desc: Construction kit that allows foundations to be placed on water.

WeaponFactory_Dirty_04.name: Advanced Weapon Assembly Line
WeaponFactory_Dirty_04.desc: An Assembly Line for producing weapons and ammunition. Advanced machinery has been introduced, enabling high-speed weapon production. Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

WidePenetrateShotgun.name: Beam Scatter
WidePenetrateShotgun.desc: A specialized beam weapon for close-range combat. It fires compressed energy in a wide, scattering blast.

WingGlider.name: Wing Pack
WingGlider.desc: A portable glider that enables flight. Consumes Wing Cell to propel the user through the skies.

WingGlider_Fuel.name: Wing Cell
WingGlider_Fuel.desc: The fuel required to power the Wing Pack.

Wood_Gate.name: Wooden Gate
Wood_Gate.desc: Wooden gate large enough for big Pals to pass through.

Wooden_houseset.name: Wooden Structure Set
Wooden_houseset.desc: Set for building bases using wood. Allows building of wooden foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

Wooden_ladder.name: Ladder
Wooden_ladder.desc: A ladder that allows you to climb to a slightly higher place.

WorkSpeedIncrease1.name: Beta Wave Generator
WorkSpeedIncrease1.desc: A device that emits beta waves to energize Pals. It increases the work speed of Pals in the base. Placing more than one will not have additional effects.

Workbench.name: Primitive Workbench
Workbench.desc: Primitive Workbench for producing simple items. Pals with Handiwork suitability help speed up production.

WorldTreeIngot.name: Paloxite Ingot
WorldTreeIngot.desc: An indomitable alloy created by fusing Soralite and Paloxite. A highly rare material, crystallizing the technology of ancient civilization and the power of the World Tree. It is vital for crafting the highest-grade equipment and structures.

YakushimaBlade.name: Meowmere
YakushimaBlade.desc: [Terraria Collab] According to the legend, this sword was brought back from a distant land by Croajiro. Why? We have no idea...
